message:
feat(fp-io): add read_sql_table columns subset parity (frankenpandas-c2zc)

Adds read_sql_table_columns(conn, table, columns) matching
pd.read_sql_table(columns=[...]) — emits the named columns in
caller-specified order. Reuses the existing alphanumeric+underscore
validator for table and each column, rejects empty columns (pandas
raises in that case), and escapes identifiers for the SELECT
projection. 5 new tests: projection ordering, single column,
empty rejection, invalid column rejection, invalid table rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
